name: scope-exclusion-stale-hold
description: Users excluded from adaptive scope 3 weeks ago but hold GUIDs persist on InPlaceHolds

commands.command: Get-RetentionCompliancePolicy "Global Retention 5Y" | Format-List Name, Guid, Enabled, AdaptiveScopeLocation, DistributionStatus
commands.output:
Name                  : Global Retention 5Y
Guid                  : a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567890
Enabled               : True
AdaptiveScopeLocation : {All Employees Scope}
DistributionStatus    : Success

commands.command: Get-AdaptiveScope "All Employees Scope" | Format-List Name, FilterConditions, LocationCount
commands.output:
Name              : All Employees Scope
FilterConditions  : (Department -ne "Contractors")
LocationCount     : 4850

commands.command: Get-Mailbox -Identity contractor1@contoso.com | Format-List InPlaceHolds, DelayHoldApplied, DelayReleaseHoldApplied
Get-Mailbox -Identity contractor2@contoso.com | Format-List InPlaceHolds, DelayHoldApplied, AccountDisabled

commands.output:
Name                  : Recoverable Items
FolderSize            : 8.7 GB (9,341,632,512 bytes)
ItemsInFolder         : 23,450
FolderType            : RecoverableItems

Name                  : SubstrateHolds
FolderSize            : 8.4 GB (9,019,431,936 bytes)
ItemsInFolder         : 22,100
FolderType            : RecoverableItems

Name: Global Retention 5Y
AdaptiveScopeLocation: All Employees Scope
DistributionStatus: Success
Enabled: True

Name: Global Retention 5Y Rule
Policy: Global Retention 5Y
RetentionDuration: 1825
RetentionComplianceAction: KeepAndDelete
Enabled: True
